caption: A crowded outdoor scene shows several men gathered together, many wearing white shirts and formal attire, appearing to be in a political or press gathering. Throughout the sequence, the men are standing close to one another, with some talking and others looking toward the camera. On-screen graphics feature a red and white news banner at the bottom with the text "HAM के संतोष कुमार सुमन मंत्री बने" and a time stamp of "10:08 PM" next to a "MAHARODH" logo. Across the top, the question "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" appears. Small inset photos and labels identify individuals such as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" and various "मंत्री" (ministers). As the frames progress, the overlay graphics shift slightly; for instance, labels for "बिजेन्द्र यादव" and "श्रवण कुमार" appear and disappear, and a fleeting phrase "कांग्रे उत्तरह" is visible in the final segment.
